# Shadow

> On-device AI council and audit chain that follows the analyst across desktop, smart glasses, and spatial AR. One engine, four device clients, five persona packs. For regulated banking workflows.

## What it is

Shadow watches the analyst's screen on-device (never uploaded by default), recognizes which document or terminal they are looking at, and surfaces three persona voices — Junior analyst (jargon translator), Senior / VP (what your boss cares about), Compliance (what NOT to share or send) — with an auditable hash chain so the bank can answer the OCC / EU AI Act question "why did your analyst make this decision."

## Architecture

- 1 engine: council-runner + on-device LLM router (Phi-4-mini / Gemma 3 9B / Apple Foundation Model 3 Core Advanced) + Perception Layer (YOLO-World + SAM2 + Depth Anything V2) + WebCrypto SHA-256 hash chain
- 4 device clients: Desktop overlay · Even G2 (monocular green HUD, no camera, customer-facing safe) · Brilliant Frame (color mini HUD, camera + local-only) · XReal Air 2 Ultra (6DoF spatial AR, JARVIS frame with 3 floating panels only the wearer sees)
- 5 persona packs: Compliance ($1,800/seat/yr) · Quant / Data Scientist ($2,400) · Engineer ($1,500) · Trader ($2,400) · Wealth Advisor ($2,000)
- Base engine $120K/yr per bank + persona seats. Mid-tier bank ACV ~$982K. 3-year SOM $4.9M ARR across 5 mid-tier banks.

## Why now

- EU AI Act Article 14 high-risk obligations start August 2026 — regulatory deadline driver for compliance-paranoid local-mode
- Local LLMs cross usable threshold mid-2026 — Gemma 3 9B / Phi-4-mini / Apple Foundation Model 3 Core Advanced
- Big 4 cut grad hires 6-29% YoY — surviving analysts need leverage faster
- $1,097-$1,331 per-employee L&D budget in financial services — Shadow at $1,500-$2,400/seat/yr fits the line item

## Two modes

- Cloud mode ($50/seat/mo): screen → Anthropic / OpenAI / GLM-5.2 → response. For non-confidential training data, public market signals, educational explanations.
- Local mode ($1,500-$2,400/analyst/year per persona): screen → on-device Gemma 3 9B / Phi-4-mini / AFM 3 Core Advanced → response. No data leaves the laptop. Use for client PII, M&A docs, internal models, anything covered by Reg B / Reg BI / EU AI Act high-risk obligations.

## Beachhead

First-year analyst at a $5B-$50B AUM regional wealth-mgmt or boutique IB firm, in their first 90 days, on a firm-issued MacBook Pro, working with Excel + CRM + research portal. Mid-tier target firms in order: Raymond James, Edward Jones, Stifel, LPL Financial, Houlihan Lokey, Lazard MM, William Blair, Jefferies, Alvarez & Marsal, FTI, regional banks $5B-$50B AUM.

## Shadow Agentic Capability Benchmark

Public, deterministic structural evaluation inspired by HuggingFace's June 2026 "Is it agentic enough?" framework. 8 representative agentic decision tasks across the 5 persona packs. Scoring rubric: voice length compliance + follow-up question structure + expected regulatory-term coverage + latency under 10s. Aggregate score reproducible with `node benchmark/runner.js` against your own ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

Current aggregate: **87 ± 3 (n=6)** mixed across two rubric versions. Pre-BR (v0.3.3, 3-term coverage on compliance × LBO): runs 87/93/86 → 88.7 ± 3.1. Post-BR (v0.3.4, 5-term coverage with Loredana's BR thresholds FICO/DTI/LTV wired): runs 86/87/85 → 86.0 ± 1.0. Compliance × LBO cell dropped 100 → mean 90 after BR wiring; we file the variance honestly and do not tune persona prompts to recover the lost points. All raw run reports persisted under `/benchmark/history/` with split SUMMARY.md so reviewers can audit by rubric version.

## Repository

- Source: https://github.com/alex-jb/shadow-mentor
- License: MIT
- Live demo: https://shadow-mentor-q0lg7uwz4-alex-jbs-projects.vercel.app
- Tests: 128/128 passing (Node --test framework, CI via GitHub Actions, 13 consecutive green commits)
- Endpoints live: 8 — POST /api/deliberate (3-voice LLM, +verdict augment with loan body) · POST /api/loan-council (pure-compute 5-voice rule layer) · GET /api/recall · /api/calibration · /api/scenarios · /api/health · /api/badge · /api/version
